# Ryno Tools

> Ryno Tools is a free, offline-capable microlearning platform for certification exam prep.
> Study ham radio (Technician, General, Extra class), falconry apprentice licensing,
> and CompTIA Security+ SY0-701 through adaptive flashcard quizzes and timed exam simulations.
> No login required. Works offline as a Progressive Web App.

## Quizzes Available

- [Ham Radio Technician](https://ryno.tools/): 500+ FCC Technician license practice questions covering regulations, operating procedures, and electronics fundamentals.
- [Ham Radio General](https://ryno.tools/): 450+ FCC General class questions on HF propagation, advanced operating, and regulations.
- [Ham Radio Extra](https://ryno.tools/): 800+ FCC Amateur Extra questions — the most advanced amateur radio license.
- [Falconry Apprentice](https://ryno.tools/): 350+ questions on raptor biology, health, housing, federal/state regulations, and hunting ethics.
- [CompTIA Security+ SY0-701](https://ryno.tools/): 400+ practice questions for the CompTIA Security+ certification.

## Features

- Tag-based question filtering
- Timed exam mode with pass/fail scoring
- Instant feedback with explanations
- Light/dark mode
- Installable as a PWA (works offline)

- [Privacy Policy](https://ryno.tools/pages/privacy.html)
- [Terms of Service](https://ryno.tools/pages/terms.html)
